_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-16 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 3/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1411.3 is above EMA18 (1388.21) and EMA50 (1346.88) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (25.25) is below its signal line (27.02) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1407.6) and resistance (1426.4) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 2.22%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
